content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.claude_teams.mcp_bridge
FILE: cosmos/integration/claude_teams/mcp_bridge.py (431 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: MCP BRIDGE - Expose Cosmos Tools to Claude Teams
======================================================

Implements Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that exposes
Cosmos's capabilities to Claude agent teams.

Cosmos controls what tools Claude teams can access.

CLASSES:
- MCPToolAccess(Enum): Access levels for MCP tools.
- MCPTool: A tool exposed via MCP.
- MCPRequest: Incoming MCP request from Claude team.
- MCPResponse: Response to MCP request.
- CosmosMCPServer: MCP Server exposing Cosmos's tools to Claude teams.

Cosmos remains in control -
  Methods: def register_tool(self, name: str, description: str, parameters: Dict[str, Any], handler: Callable, 
  Methods: def unregister_tool(self, name: str) -> None
  Methods: def set_team_access(self, team_id: str, access: MCPToolAccess) -> None
  Methods: def check_access(self, team_id: str, tool_name: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def handle_request(self, tool_name: str, arguments: Dict[str, Any], requesting_agent: str) -> 
  Methods: def list_tools(self, team_id: Optional[str]=None) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
  Methods: def get_stats(self) -> Dict[str, Any]

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_mcp_server() -> CosmosMCPServer
